action_items.task: Submit updated paystub to Janet at the front desk
action_items.context: PO needs an updated paystub for the file due to the client's recent shift and hours change.
Client has a previously scheduled UA and plans to come by around 2:00 or 3:00 PM after work.
Janet at the front desk will scan the paystub once Marcus drops it off.

critical_updates.details: Client remains employed at the distribution center but was moved to the morning shift a couple of weeks ago. He is working 40 hours a week steadily, plus overtime.
Client continues to live with his mother. The living situation is stable and has improved slightly as his new early morning schedule prevents them from being in each other's way.
